method.budget_layer_question: whether high-budget pair lift is systematically higher than low-budget pair lift

support_floor.extreme: actual_co >= 8 and expected_co >= 2 and lift >= 3 and p_tail <= 0.01
support_floor.strong: actual_co >= 5 and expected_co >= 1.5 and lift >= 3 and p_tail <= 0.05

source_scope.amount_basis: budget_amount preferred; award_amount fallback; distinct case basis
source_scope.amount_tier_rule: log amount ranked tertile because amount distribution contains large upper-tail values
source_scope.incidence_source: G40C attended reviewer rows deduplicated by case and reviewer
